title: Cannot move out of borrowed content
explanation: This error occurs when you try to move a value out of a reference. Since a reference does not own the value, you cannot take ownership of the value through a reference.
error_message: error[E0507]: cannot move out of `person.name` which is behind a shared reference

fixes.description: Take ownership of the whole struct

tip: If the type implements Copy, it will be copied automatically. For other types, you need to clone or restructure your code.
